examples: The frequency response and radiation characteristics of a microstrip Yagi Array antenna were studied.
The Finite Difference Time Domain(FDTD) method was used to calculate the Voltage Standing Wave Ratio(VSWR) of a quasi-Yagi antenna.
A microstrip Yagi antenna that employs a 2-d EBG (Electromagnetic Band-gap) ground plane as the reflector is presented in this paper.
